originalTitle: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
content: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.

originalTitle: Ringleader of suspected human trafficking network arrested in Ethiopia
title: Yay! A Big Helper is Caught in Ethiopia!
content:
Good News from Ethiopia!

Hello, my amazing friends! Guess what? We have some super important and happy news to share with you from a beautiful country called Ethiopia! It’s in our wonderful continent of Africa, a place full of sunshine and friendly faces. Sometimes, even in happy places, there can be people who don't make the best choices. But the good news is, there are always brave helpers who make things right! This story is about a person who was not being very kind, and how our hero police officers stepped in to help. It's like when a superhero catches a villain, but this is a real-life story! The police in Ethiopia have done something amazing to help lots of people.

Who Was Making People Sad?

So, there was a person named Yetbarek. Yetbarek was doing something that made many people sad and worried. He was tricking people, especially grown-ups, into going far away from their homes and families. Imagine being tricked into going somewhere you don't want to go, and not being able to see your mommy or daddy or your best friend! That's what Yetbarek was doing. He was like a tricky fox, telling stories that were not true. He would tell people they could find a better life somewhere else, but it wasn't true. Instead, he would make them feel scared and unhappy when they got there. This is very, very not kind. Yetbarek was trying to get lots and lots of money from people’s families by making them sad. It was a very big problem, making many families worry. Did you know? Ethiopia is a country in East Africa. It has beautiful mountains, rivers, and ancient cities! It's famous for inventing coffee!

Why Was This Not Good?

When Yetbarek tricked people, they couldn't be with their families anymore. Family is super important, isn't it? It's where we feel safe, loved, and happy. When people were tricked, they couldn't play with their friends, go to their favorite park, or eat yummy food made by their loved ones. They were far away and felt all alone. No one should ever be made to feel scared or alone. Everyone deserves to be safe and happy, especially with their families. Yetbarek was making people sad, scared, and sometimes even hurt. This is why it was so important for someone to stop him. Think about how sad you would be if you couldn't be with your family for a long, long time. That’s how these people felt. Did you know? Being safe means you feel good and no one is hurting you or making you scared. It's a very important feeling for everyone!

Our Heroes: The Police!

But guess what? We have heroes in real life too! The police officers in Ethiopia are like super-detectives. They heard about the sad things Yetbarek was doing, and they decided to do something about it. They worked really, really hard. They followed clues, talked to many people, and looked everywhere to find Yetbarek. It took a lot of bravery and smart thinking, just like in a puzzle game! The police wanted to make sure that no more people would be tricked and made sad. They wanted to help everyone feel safe again. And guess what? They did it! They found Yetbarek! Hooray for the police! When they found him, it meant that he couldn't trick people anymore. This is wonderful news for all the families who were worried. Did you know? Police officers are special helpers in our communities. They wear uniforms and keep us safe from bad guys. They are very brave!

What Happens Now?

So, what happens after the police catch someone who wasn't being kind? Well, now Yetbarek is with the police. They will talk to him and ask him many questions to understand everything that happened. This is a very important step because it helps the police understand how to stop bad things from happening again in the future. This means that the police are making sure that people who do not make good choices learn that what they did was wrong. It also means that the people who were tricked can now get help and hopefully go back to their families and be safe again. It’s like cleaning up a messy room – once the mess is gone, everyone feels better! Did you know? When someone does something wrong, like stealing a toy or not being kind, there are rules to help everyone understand what is fair and what is not. This helps keep our world a safe place!

Staying Safe and Kind!

This story shows us how important it is for everyone to be kind and safe. If someone ever tries to trick you, or makes you feel scared, or tells you to go somewhere you don't want to go, what should you do? You should ALWAYS tell a trusted grown-up right away! That could be your mom, dad, grandparent, teacher, or another grown-up you trust very much. They are there to help you! Remember, our world in Africa is full of amazing people who care about each other. It’s a place where we want everyone to feel happy and safe. The police are always working hard to protect us, and this story from Ethiopia is a super example of their bravery and hard work. Let's all try to be kind, look out for each other, and remember that asking for help is always a strong thing to do! Did you know? Africa is the second-largest continent in the world! It has 54 countries and many different languages and cultures. It's a truly amazing place!
summary: Police in Ethiopia caught a person named Yetbarek who was tricking people and making them sad, which is good news for everyone's safety.
whyMatters: This is important because it means fewer people will be tricked and made sad, and everyone can feel safer and happier with their families. It shows that brave police officers are always working to help us!

title: Carnival fever hits Lagos as locals celebrate Afro-Brazilian heritage
content: The centuries-old Fanti Carnival returned to Nigeria on Monday with a burst of colour and spectacle.

originalTitle: Iranians commemorate victims of Minab school strike
title: Remembering Friends at Minab School
content:
Hello from Africa, little adventurers!

Guess what? News is not just for grown-ups! It's for everyone, even super smart kids like you. Today, we have a very special story from a faraway land called Iran. Iran is a country that is very far from Africa, but just like us, people there care about remembering important things.

A Sad Day to Remember

Many, many years ago, a very sad thing happened in a town called Minab in Iran. It was a terrible day when something bad happened at a school for girls. You know how much we love our schools, right? Schools are places where we learn, play, and make friends. But on that sad day, many people, like big sisters and teachers, lost their lives. It was a very, very sad loss for many families and for the whole town. It was a day that made everyone feel very heartbroken. Did you know? There are schools all over the world, teaching children just like you! Some schools are big, some are small, but they all help kids learn and grow.

What Does 'Commemorate' Mean?

Now, here's a big word: 'commemorate'. Can you say it with me? 'Com-mem-or-ate'. Wow, good job! What does it mean? It means to remember something very important, often something sad, in a special way. It's like when you remember your birthday or a special holiday, but it's for something very serious. People commemorate to show that they have not forgotten the people who were lost and to help each other feel better. In Minab, people commemorated this sad day. This means they came together to remember all the people who were lost at the school. They wanted to show that even though many years have passed, they still think about them. It's like holding someone in your heart, even when they are not physically with you.

How People Remember

So, how do people commemorate or remember? They do it in different ways. Sometimes, they gather in a quiet place. They might bring beautiful flowers to lay down. Flowers are a way to show love and peace. They might say prayers or have a moment of quiet thinking. They might light candles, which show hope and a light in the darkness. They also share stories. Sharing stories helps everyone remember what happened and to keep the memory of the people alive. It's important to talk about our feelings, especially when we are sad. When people remember together, they feel less alone. They hold hands and comfort each other. This helps to heal their hearts a little bit. Did you know? In many cultures, lighting a candle is a symbol of hope, remembrance, and bringing light into the world.

Why Remembering is Important

Why is it so important to remember sad things? It's not to make us feel sad all the time, but to help us learn. When we remember what happened, we can try our best to make sure such sad things don't happen again. It helps us think about peace and kindness. We want all children, everywhere, to be safe and happy, especially at school. Remembering also helps us to be kind to each other. When something sad happens in a community, it shows everyone how important it is to be friends, to help each other, and to care. We learn to appreciate every day we have and all the wonderful people around us.

Schools are Special Places

Think about your school. What do you love about it? Maybe it's your friends, your teachers, or your favorite lessons. Schools are like little homes where we learn big things. We learn to read, write, count, and even draw amazing pictures. Schools help us prepare for our future, for all the exciting adventures that are waiting for us. That's why the sad event at the Minab school was so hard. It happened in a place where children should feel safe and happy. Commemorating the victims helps everyone remember how precious our schools are and how much we should protect them. Did you know? The longest school holiday in some parts of the world can be up to three months long! Plenty of time for play!

Wishing for Peace and Kindness

When we hear stories like this from far away, it makes us think about peace. Peace means everyone is happy and safe, and there are no fights or sad events. It means people are kind to each other and help one another. Every time people commemorate a sad event, they are also wishing for more peace in the world. They hope that all children can go to school, play with their friends, and learn without any worries. They hope for a world where everyone is treated with love and kindness. And you, little reporters, can help too! By being kind to your friends, sharing your toys, and listening to your teachers, you are helping to make the world a more peaceful place, one kind act at a time. So, the people in Minab remembered those they lost. They remembered with love, with quiet thoughts, and with a wish for a brighter, more peaceful future for everyone. It shows us that even after many years, love and memory stay strong in our hearts.
summary: In Iran, people remembered a very sad day long ago when many lives were lost at a girls' school in Minab, showing love and wishing for peace.
whyMatters: It's important to remember sad events so we can learn from them, be kind to each other, and always work for peace and safety in schools everywhere.

originalTitle: World's best keeper? Raya helps Arsenal get back on track
title: Yay! Our Super Goalkeeper David Raya Helps His Team Win!
content:
Jambo, Awesome Friends of Africa!

Hello, amazing kids! Welcome to your super duper Kid News from Africa! Guess what exciting story we have for you today? It's all about football, fun, and a very special player who is like a superhero on the field! His name is David Raya. He plays for a big, famous team called Arsenal. Let's find out how he helped his team win a very important game!

Meet David Raya: The Goalkeeper Hero!

David Raya is a very important football player. He plays for a big team that wears red and white clothes, called Arsenal. This team plays in a country far, far away. David Raya has a very special job. He is a 'goalkeeper.' Can you say that? Go-al-keep-er! It's a big word for a super big job!

What Does a Goalkeeper Do?

Imagine a big green field where people play football. At each end of the field, there is a very big net, like a giant gate. This is called the 'goal.' The other team wants to kick the round football into your team's goal to score a point. But David Raya stands right in front of his team's goal. His job is to stop the ball from going in! He is like a brave guard for his team's castle. He watches the ball with his eyes, ready to jump, dive, or stretch his body to push the ball away. It's a very exciting and important job! Did you know? Goalkeepers are the only players in football who can touch the ball with their hands during the game (but only inside a special box near their goal!). They wear special thick gloves to protect their hands and help them catch the speedy ball.

A Very Big Game!

So, Arsenal, David Raya's team, played a game against another team called Sporting. This was not just any game! It was a very important game where both teams wanted to win so much. Everyone who loves football was watching to see which team would be the winner. The players ran very fast and kicked the ball with all their might. Both teams tried their best to kick the ball into the goal. The Sporting team tried very, very hard to score goals against Arsenal. They kicked the ball high, they kicked it low, and they kicked it super fast!

Raya's Super Saves!

But guess who was ready? Our hero, David Raya! He was super-duper fast. When the Sporting players kicked the ball towards his goal, David Raya was always there. He jumped high in the air! He dived low to the ground! He stretched his long arms and legs to push the ball away. He saved so many balls from going into Arsenal's goal. Each time he stopped the ball, it was like a small victory! He was like a brave lion, guarding his den, making sure no one could get past him. The Sporting team tried and tried, but they just could not get the ball past David Raya. Did you know? When a goalkeeper stops the ball from going into the net, it's called a 'save'! David Raya made many amazing saves in this game.

Arsenal Wins! Yay!

Because David Raya was so, so good at stopping the balls, the Sporting team could not score any goals. That means they scored 'zero' goals! But Arsenal, David Raya's team, did score one goal! Just one goal was enough to win the whole game because the other team scored zero. Arsenal won by 1-0! Everyone was so happy! David Raya's teammates and all the fans were cheering very loudly for him and the whole team. It was a super exciting win! David Raya helped his team get 'back on track,' which means they are doing very well again. Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the whole world! Billions of people love to watch and play it, even here in Africa!

Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!

Football is a team game. This means that many players have to work together, like friends playing a game. David Raya did an amazing job, but his friends on the Arsenal team also helped. Some players kicked the ball forward to try and score. Some players helped stop the other team from coming close to their goal. Everyone had an important job to do. When everyone works together, like a big happy family, amazing things can happen! David Raya saved the goals, and his teammates helped score a goal. This is what we call 'teamwork'! Did you know? The word 'team' means a group of people working together for a common goal. Just like you work with your friends in school to learn new things!

Why This Story is Important for You!

This story about David Raya tells us something very important. It tells us that trying your best is super, super important! David Raya practiced a lot to be so good. And when he tried his very, very best in the game, he helped his team win. It also shows us that teamwork is magic! When we help each other, we can achieve great things, just like Arsenal won their game. So, next time you are playing a game with your friends, or doing something at school, remember David Raya. Try your best. Work together with your friends. You can be a superstar too! Maybe one day, you will be a famous football player, or a great artist, or a super smart scientist! Did you know? Many famous African football players, like Sadio Mané or Mohamed Salah, started just like you, playing with friends and dreaming big! You can do it too!

Keep Shining Bright!

That's all for today's exciting news, my dear friends! Thank you for listening. See you next time for more amazing stories from around the world and right here in Africa. Keep shining bright and dreaming big!
summary: David Raya, the amazing goalkeeper for Arsenal, played a super important role by making fantastic saves that helped his team win a big football game 1-0 against Sporting.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows us that trying your best, like David Raya did, and working together as a team can help you achieve great things, both in sports and in life.
